name: TSUIJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - METSUGEKI (HAMMER ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - DOOMHAMMER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mas Mob

Make a single attack against the target, which gains a +4 bonus to its critical threat range. If the attack hits, it deals normal damage which ignores all hardness and

DR, and knocks the target back a number of feet equal to the damage dealt. If the target collides with a solid object during its knockback, it suffers damage as though it had fallen 20 feet (2d6).

A Samurai with at least 10 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Tsuijutsu path, and only once per round. If you substitute the technique this way, the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

This technique can be used once per day.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps each allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.
